Philippines.headline: Volcanic eruption is on going for Kanlaon in Philippines
Philippines.description: Volcano Kanlaon is emitting ash clouds according to the regional VAAC. The aviation alert level is Green.

Philippines.headline: Green earthquake (Magnitude 5.8M, Depth:35km) in Philippines 06/07/2026 08:11 UTC, 850 thousand in MMI>=IV.
Philippines.description: On 7/6/2026 8:11:11 AM, an earthquake occurred in Philippines potentially affecting 850 thousand in MMI>=IV. The earthquake had Magnitude 5.8M, Depth:35km.

Philippines.headline: Drought is on going in China, Indonesia, Cambodia, Laos, Malaysia, Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam
Philippines.description: The  Drought notification level is Green.

Philippines.headline: Red notification for tropical cyclone BAVI-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 35.53 million .
Philippines.description: From 01/07/2026 to 10/07/2026, a Hurricane/Typhoon > 74 mph (maximum wind speed of 287 km/h) BAVI-26 was active in NWPacific.
